title: Senior Teacher - Arena Animation - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Arena Animation - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
